author: Sharma, Devi D.
imprint: Hoshiarpur: Vishveshvaranand Vishva Bandhu Institute of Sanskrit and Indological Studies, Panjab University
title: Studies in Tibeto-Himalayan linguistics:  A descriptive analysis of Pattani (a dialect of Lahaul)
notes: JP notes 7/30/97:  Looks like the entire wordlist (end of book) has been entered; perhaps this should be changed to 'complete'?  Transcription has been normalized.  Correspondences are as follows:  all retroflex consonants (under-dots) -> appropriate IPA symbols, including dotted r -> voiced retroflex fricative (hooked 'z'); over-dotted n -> engma; hatchek-c -> t-esh cluster; t̑ -> IPA palatal nasal; j -> IPA voiced palatal fricative (inverted 'f'); s̉ -> IPA voiceless palatal fricative; h for aspiration has been superscripted.  Note also that 'y' has not been changed to IPA 'j'.
